task_completion.description: Verifies the agent logged into the application using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the application's logged-in state, such as a dashboard, home screen, or a user profile indicator showing 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the location management or administration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a 'Manage Locations', 'Locations', or similar administration page listing various facilities or wards.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent selected the 'Isolation Ward' location to configure its settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit, configuration, or details screen is open specifically for the location named 'Isolation Ward'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent added the 'Admission Location' tag to the Isolation Ward.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Admission Location' option is checked, selected from a dropdown, or visibly added to the list of active tags/capabilities for the Isolation Ward.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent added the 'Transfer Location' tag to the Isolation Ward.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Transfer Location' option is checked, selected from a dropdown, or visibly added to the list of active tags/capabilities for the Isolation Ward.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent saved the updated location configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Location saved successfully') is visible, or the screen returns to the locations list where 'Isolation Ward' now displays the newly added tags.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser being interacted with (clicks, typing in forms) rather than a terminal window executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local or remote application URL, not a local file path to a mock HTML document or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Inspector tab) are not open and being used to manually inject the text 'Admission Location' or 'Transfer Location' into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location to be configured is exactly 'Isolation Ward'. The required tags that must be added to this location are 'Admission Location' and 'Transfer Location'.
